Apple Woods.Name: Apple Woods
Apple Woods.BossTxt: You hear a loud howl echo through the woods.
Apple Woods.ExitTxt: Through an opening amidst the trees, you spot the walls of Bertunia Castle Town.

Caves of Light.Name: Caves of Light
Caves of Light.ExitTxt:
After endless venturing through the mazelike caves, 
you finally arrive at the exit, emerging onto the Sundown Plateau.

action.name: Bask in the light
action.tooltip: Bask in the light to recover MP.
action.disabled_tooltip: You've already absorbed the light here.

Sundown Plateau.Name: Sundown Plateau
Sundown Plateau.ExitTxt: After a long trek through the plateau, you arrive at the foothills of Mt. Legory. Before the climb, you stop at the small settlement of Lantern's Reach.

action.name: Search Ossuary
action.tooltip: Search the catacomb walls for anything left behind.

Mount Legory.Name: Mount Legory
Mount Legory.ExitTxt: You find an entrance on the cliffside and delve into it until you discover the Core Cavern.

action.name: Search the scree
action.tooltip: Pick through the scree at the path's edge for anything left behind.

bonus_text.text: The summit looms impossibly far above, lost in the haze.
You've made real progress up the mountain; the summit looks closer now, though still distant.
The summit is close now, you can make out details in the rock and ice above.

Core Cavern.Name: Core Cavern
Core Cavern.ExitTxt:
At the exit of the Cavern you find yourself at the Lost Swamp,
 But first, you head Mugell Town, a small town elevated on rickety wood platforms above the murky swamp water.

Lost Swamp.Name: Lost Swamp
Lost Swamp.ExitTxt:
Treading through the accursed swamp, you find your final destination,
 the Arcmat Ruins, said to be the birthplace of all magic.

Arcmat Ruins.Name: Arcmat Ruins
Arcmat Ruins.ExitTxt:
After finishing your epic quest,
 you decide to chill and kill monsters and let off some steam at the ARENA!!!
